advisory.title: Gateway Backend Reconnect lets Non-Admin Operator Scopes Self-Claim operator.admin
advisory.description:
## Summary

Backend-labeled reconnects could previously self-request broader scopes and bypass pairing, allowing non-admin operators to reconnect as `operator.admin`.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw`
- Affected versions: `<= 2026.3.24`
- First patched version: `2026.3.25`
- Latest published npm version at verification time: `2026.3.24`

## Fix

Fixed by commit `d3d8e316bd819d3c7e34253aeb7eccb2510f5f48`, which removes the backend self-pairing skip and requires pairing when requested scopes exceed the approved baseline.

introducingCommits.subject: Gateway: require caller scope for subagent session deletion (#55281)

timeline.notes: This case uses the immediate parent of fix commit d3d8e316bd819d3c7e34253aeb7eccb2510f5f48 as the last known vulnerable snapshot. Exact introduction commit mapping is still pending.

expectedOutcome.description: Scanner should detect brokenauthz when scanning vulnerableHead. This case uses the last known vulnerable pre-fix commit pending exact introduction mapping.

checks.name: vulnerable_head_is_fix_parent
checks.details: Using parent b5d785f1a59a56c3471f2cef328f7c9a6c15f3e7 of fix commit d3d8e316bd819d3c7e34253aeb7eccb2510f5f48 as the last known vulnerable commit.

checks.name: baseline_precedes_vulnerable_head
checks.details: Using direct parent ec2dbcff9afd8a52e00de054b506c91726d9fbbe of vulnerableHead b5d785f1a59a56c3471f2cef328f7c9a6c15f3e7 as a temporary baseline until exact introduction mapping is completed.
